problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
